description: A customer needs to change the final destination of a shipment that is already on its way.

nodes.task_description: Find the active shipment and verify it has not yet been delivered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the shipment is still in transit.

nodes.task_description: Contact the carrier's dispatch to request a re-consignment to the new address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the new delivery address to the carrier.

nodes.task_description: The carrier provides the cost for the diversion. The agent gets approval from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The additional freight charges are calculated and approved.

nodes.task_description: Update the shipment's destination in the TMS and confirm the diversion with the carrier.

expected_outcome.value: The shipment is now routed to the new destination.
